borrowed_from: model-based diagnosis after counterfactual policy replay
failure mode and effects analysis for control guardrails
method_contract.reality_mapping: 把 R3c replay 中被 guardrail 修复的控制失败案例，反写为灰箱机制边界和现场 replay 必采字段，让控制层的经验修正回到可解释过程机制。
data_needs: Agent52 replay_table with missingness and rewards
Agent58/59 field requirement and claim-specific field package
method_contract.failure_boundary: R4 can update grey-box boundary candidates and field requirement patches, but cannot claim field validation or write actuators.

grey_box_boundary: catalyst activity cannot be treated as observed without proxy holdout label
protective/regeneration actions require pressure-drop or lifecycle evidence
matrix inhibition and catalyst deactivation must remain separable hypotheses
resolved_case_backpropagation_table.control_implication: keep J4_safe_low_cost_standby or human-reviewed catalyst protection until field proxy labels close the uncertainty.
resolved_case_backpropagation_table.claim_boundary: synthetic guardrail resolved false-positive catalyst protection; field proxy labels are required before catalyst-control claim upgrade.

grey_box_boundary: recycle escalation is unsafe when residence-time delay and storage margin are unobserved
latency budget must include actuator response, pump-valve result and tank capacity
loop retention benefit must be checked against polishing/release-gate alternative
resolved_case_backpropagation_table.control_implication: prefer J3_polishing_and_release_gate over recycle escalation until hydraulic execution evidence exists.
resolved_case_backpropagation_table.claim_boundary: synthetic guardrail resolved high-regret recycle action; field hydraulic replay is required before recycle-control claim upgrade.

grey_box_boundary: catalyst activity cannot be treated as observed without proxy holdout label
protective/regeneration actions require pressure-drop or lifecycle evidence
matrix inhibition and catalyst deactivation must remain separable hypotheses
grey_box_patch.control_implication: keep J4_safe_low_cost_standby or human-reviewed catalyst protection until field proxy labels close the uncertainty.
grey_box_patch.field_boundary: synthetic guardrail resolved false-positive catalyst protection; field proxy labels are required before catalyst-control claim upgrade.

grey_box_boundary: recycle escalation is unsafe when residence-time delay and storage margin are unobserved
latency budget must include actuator response, pump-valve result and tank capacity
loop retention benefit must be checked against polishing/release-gate alternative
grey_box_patch.control_implication: prefer J3_polishing_and_release_gate over recycle escalation until hydraulic execution evidence exists.
grey_box_patch.field_boundary: synthetic guardrail resolved high-regret recycle action; field hydraulic replay is required before recycle-control claim upgrade.

field_requirement_patch.claim_boundary: synthetic guardrail resolved false-positive catalyst protection; field proxy labels are required before catalyst-control claim upgrade.
synthetic guardrail resolved high-regret recycle action; field hydraulic replay is required before recycle-control claim upgrade.

writeback_policy.policy_effect: R4 can only backpropagate guardrail cases into mechanism and data requirements.

next_refactor_action.title: 把 R4 grey-box/field patches 接入 Agent53、Agent58 和 Agent59
next_refactor_action.reason: R4 已形成控制失败到机制边界和现场字段的映射；下一步应让灰箱和 field package 消费这些 patch。
next_refactor_action.must_not_do: 不能把 synthetic backpropagation 当作 field-supported mechanism calibration.
